title: Women's Day 2026: A woman lawyer's negotiation with ambition
description: The legal profession trains us to measure our words carefully. Precision is discipline. Preparation is identity. For years, I believed that if I worked hard enough, understood the law thoroughly and argued with clarity, that would be sufficient.Over time, I realised I was measuring something else too — my tone, my pauses, my reactions.There are days I replay not the submissions I made, but the ones I softened. The moment when a remark went uncorrected because responding might have appeared confr
